'''hawoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcnearite|mcnearite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcnearite|mcnearite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hawoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæweseth|hæweseth]] || [[word:hæwesej|hæwesej]] || [[word:hæwesesh|hæwesesh]] || [[word:hæwese|hæwese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawowosoth|hawowosoth]] || [[word:hawowosoj|hawowosoj]] || [[word:hawowososh|hawowososh]] || [[word:hawowoso|hawowoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawosoth|hawosoth]] || [[word:hawosoj|hawosoj]] || [[word:hawososh|hawososh]] || [[word:hawoso|hawoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawofsoth|hawofsoth]] || [[word:hawofsoj|hawofsoj]] || [[word:hawofsosh|hawofsosh]] || [[word:hawofsof|hawofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hawosotho|hawosotho]] || [[word:hawosojo|hawosojo]] || [[word:hawososho|hawososho]] || [[word:hawosoko|hawosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hawosoth|hawosoth]] || [[word:hawosoj|hawosoj]] || [[word:hawososh|hawososh]] || [[word:hawoso|hawoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hawosothol|hawosothol]] || [[word:hawosojol|hawosojol]] || [[word:hawososhol|hawososhol]] || [[word:hawosokol|hawosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hawosothotho|hawosothotho]] || [[word:hawosojojo|hawosojojo]] || [[word:hawososhosho|hawososhosho]] || [[word:hawosoko|hawosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hawosothon|hawosothon]] || [[word:hawosojon|hawosojon]] || [[word:hawososhon|hawososhon]] || [[word:hawosokon|hawosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hawosothoro|hawosothoro]] || [[word:hawosojoro|hawosojoro]] || [[word:hawososhoro|hawososhoro]] || [[word:hawosokoro|hawosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
